events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Big Day
angles.copy: Peace and love to the one and only Ringo Starr, celebrating his 86th birthday today! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums or vocals?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Sir Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs to actual astrophysics, is there anything this man can't do?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Charm
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's Legacy
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed the game forever, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star? We'll let you be the judge!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became an instant classic of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. What's your go-to track from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Remembered
angles.copy: Peace, love, and three days of music! 57 years ago today, Woodstock kicked off, becoming a defining moment for a generation. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death (1977)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his passing. His music lives on forever. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death (1970)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his death. His guitar wizardry continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and one of the most famous album covers in history. What's your favourite track from their final recorded masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Day
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and style continue to captivate.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad Fer It Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger after all these years. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' re-released (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was re-released in the UK in 1975, four years after its initial album release in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's Re-release
angles.copy: On this day in 1975, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' saw a UK re-release. A song that still resonates globally. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple launched the revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember when you could fit 1,000 songs in your pocket? 25 years ago today, Apple launched the first iPod, revolutionising portable music. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. The legendary Beatle and peace activist was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.
